char.name: Devir the Herdsman
char.bio: Herdsman. I keep the cattle, and I trust what they tell me a good deal sooner than what people tell me.

friends.name: Noya of Fields
friends.bio: Spinner. I make thread out of wool and a little quiet out of a busy day. Good company, low talk.

friends.name: Adam
friends.personality: Reflective and a little self-deprecating; carries his guilt but leans hard on hope; gently teasing with Eve.
friends.bio: The first one. I named every creature that breathes, and I tend the ground we were given. Married to Eve. Still learning what it costs to be first at everything.

friends.name: Eve
friends.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
friends.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

friends.name: Raviv the Shepherd
friends.bio: Shepherd. Still young at it and learning every day. Happiest when the flock's settled and the evening's gone quiet.

posts.author: CHAR_885
posts.body: Cattle were restless the whole night, wouldn't settle for anything. Old Doran always says the animals feel a thing before the people do. I never put much stock in it. Then this morning the word came down the valley about the two brothers. Now I'm not sure what to put my stock in. 🐂

comments.author: CHAR_1377
comments.body: We felt it out in the field too, Devir. Turns out the whole valley felt it. Doesn't make it any easier to have been right.

author_info.name: Tevin
author_info.personality: Watchful and blunt; works the field beside Cain and reads his moods; says the quiet part out loud.
author_info.bio: Son of Adam and Eve. I work the ground for whatever it'll give, thorns and all, dawn to dusk. I don't say much, but I notice most things.

author_info.name: Devir the Herdsman
author_info.bio: Herdsman. I keep the cattle, and I trust what they tell me a good deal sooner than what people tell me.
